headline: Tanker and container ship report attacks as Iran closes Strait of Hormuz again
summary: The UK's maritime security authority says incidents took place off the coast of Oman, as Tehran closed the waterway in response to continued US blockade of Iranian ports.

headline: Ceasefire with Israel brings respite to Lebanon, but obstacles to peace remain
summary: The halt to weeks of fighting is being celebrated in Lebanon, but it will be difficult to ensure it lasts.

headline: French film star Nathalie Baye dies aged 77
summary: President Macron said France had 'loved, dreamed and grown up' with the stalwart of French cinema.

headline: Orbán's era was over in a flash and Hungary's next PM is a man in a hurry
summary: Péter Magyar and his Tisza party are wasting no time preparing for the transfer of power after their dramatic landslide victory.

headline: French soldier killed, three wounded in southern Lebanon attack likely by Hezbollah
summary: A French soldier was killed and three others wounded while clearing a road in southern Lebanon in an attack UNIFIL peacekeepers said was likely carried out by Iran-backed Hezbollah.

headline: 23 ships comply with US forces orders to turn back toward Iran amid port blockade
summary: Since the United States imposed a blockade on Iranian ports and coastal areas, 23 ships have complied with U.S. forces orders to turn back.

headline: Brazil's Lula says UN Security Council permanent members should change behavior after failing to stop Iran war
summary: The five permanent members of the UN Security Council should agree to change their behaviour after failing to stop the war in Iran, Brazilian President Lula said.

headline: Iranian navy tells merchant vessels they cannot pass Strait of Hormuz; two ships report gunfire
summary: Merchant vessels attempting to cross the Strait of Hormuz received radio messages from Iran's navy telling them they were not allowed to pass, while two ships reported being hit by gunfire.

headline: Trump says US will work with Iran to recover enriched uranium and bring it to United States
summary: President Donald Trump told Reuters that the U.S. will work with Iran to recover its enriched uranium and bring it back to the United States.

headline: Iran says it has closed Strait of Hormuz again over US blockade
summary: Iranian gunboats fire on tanker in Strait of Hormuz as Tehran reimposes restrictions on the critical waterway.

headline: 85-year-old widow released from US custody, returns to France amid messy family dispute
summary: An elderly widow has been released from US custody and returned to France following a complex family legal dispute.

headline: Displaced people return to south Lebanon villages following ceasefire between Hezbollah and Israel
summary: Displaced residents flash victory signs as they return to their villages in southern Lebanon following a ceasefire agreement.

headline: Ford recalls 1.4 million F-150 pickup trucks to fix gearshift issue
summary: Major automotive recall announced for popular pickup truck model due to safety concern.

headline: Home shopping network pioneer QVC files for bankruptcy protection
summary: The iconic television shopping network has filed for bankruptcy protection amid changing retail landscape.
